description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a chaise lounge on the right side and a clean, minimalist design. The sofa features three large, rectangular backrest cushions and three seat cushions, all appearing to be firmly attached and uniformly sized. Two square throw pillows are placed at each end, adding comfort and a touch of symmetry. The armrests are straight, padded, and extend to the same height as the backrest, giving the sofa a boxy, contemporary profile. The legs are short, block-style, and barely visible, suggesting a stable and grounded base. The upholstery is smooth and solid-colored, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching, contributing to its sleek, urban aesthetic.
description: A modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a chaise lounge, straight padded armrests, and smooth, solid-colored upholstery. Features three backrest cushions, three seat cushions, and two square throw pillows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, three backrest and seat cushions, two armrests, and both throw pillows.
description_view_1: Side view from the chaise end, highlighting the depth of the chaise lounge and the straight armrest profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, segmented backrest and the sofa's overall length.
description_view_3: Side view from the shorter armrest end, showing the sofa's width and the arrangement of cushions and pillows.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, attached seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all uniform in size, with two loose square throw pillows at each end.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, padded armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest, with a boxy, contemporary profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, minimally visible, likely made of wood or metal, with a recessed appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, segmented backrest with three attached rectangular cushions, continuous across the length of the sofa.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid-colored, smooth upholstery with no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
